title: DecoFirmaCraft (TFC)
description: Addon for TerraFirmaCraft that adds many new block variants to exponentially expand your possibilities
body:
## **To disable new ores and/or rock types from spawning download the alternate mod files under the current version!**

**Current additions:**

7 new rock variants:

• Pillars
• Columns (change between the 4 variants by right clicking with a hammer!)
• Roads
• Tiles
• Thin outline
• Thick outline
• Large Bricks

5 new metal variant:

• Gates
• Bricks
• Cut
• Smooth
• Pillar

5 new rock types:

• Arkose
• Blueschist
• Serpentine
• Travertine
• Tuff

5 new decorative metals:

• Alumina
• Aluminum - Made from melting alumina with cryolite in a blast furnace. Its powder can be used as a kaolin powder substitute.
• Lead
• Pewter - Made from tin, lead, and optionally bismuth.
• Platinum

4 new ores:

• Bauxite - Found in sedimentary rocks near the surface. Melts into alumina
• Galena - Found in sedimentary rocks near the surface. Melts into lead
• Native Aluminum - Found in volcanic biomes underground. Closer to the surface it is found in igneous extrusive, deeper it is found in igneous intrusive. The deeper you go the more common and richer the vein. VERY rare. Melts into aluminum
• Native Platinum - Found in metamorphic rocks deep underground. Melts into platinum

5 new ceramic variants:

• Shingles - Made with new shingle item
• Painted Bricks
• Normal Tiles - Made with new tile item
• Small Tiles - Made with new tile item
• Glazed Tiles

1 new recipe type:

• Painting - performed by rightclicking on a block with a paintbrush in the main hand a bucket of fluid in the off hand

2 new plaster variants

• Smooth Plaster - Made by painting mason bricks or wood planks with plaster
• Plaster Pillar - Made by painting a pillar with plaster

3 new glass variants

• Glass bricks
• Glass "blocks" (tiles)
• Leaded Glass - Made from new leaded glass batches

1 new glass type

• Foggy Glass

Concrete revamp, use fluid concrete to craft smooth concrete

2 new concrete variants

• Concrete Slabs - Crafted by filling slab molds with concrete
• Cinder Blocks - Crafted by filling cinder block molds with concrete

1 new wood variant

• Wood Panels - Same uses as wood planks

Modified the pre existing metal blocks to melt into 25 mb instead of 100. Along with this they now produce 4 blocks per ingot. Same goes for all new variants.

Worldgen for all these rock types and ores is implemented and on by default. Pack devs can disable them by editing tfc's world_preset file and this mods vein files

Thanks to tfc devs for helping me implement rock types worldgen



Will upload better screenshots soon :troll:



**Future additions (assets already made):**







**Planned additions (assets AREN'T made):**

Adjusting the color palletes of the new rock types to have better hue shifting

Metal columns

Metal decorations (candleholders, goblets, plates)

5 other new rock types:

• Pumice
• Peridotite
• Argillite
• Flint
• Soapstone

Mineral "ores" (olivine, quartz, feldspar)

Wood beams

Metal and stone fountains




Current additions are inspired by TFCAdditions for TFC 1.7 (thats why theres 2 outline blocks :P)

Will change fusionctm out for connectedtexturesmod whenever it decides to update to 1.20.1

Suggestions are greatly appreciated

People who know how to use MCResources are much more appreciated

Addendum: Please :plead:
